question: How much revenue does each marketing channel generate?
sql: SELECT u.traffic_source AS acquisition_channel, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS buyers FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` u ON u.id = oi.user_id WHERE oi.status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY revenue DESC
analyst_notes: users.traffic_source is the ACQUISITION channel (how the user originally arrived); events.traffic_source is per-session. 'Revenue by channel' means lifetime attribution to acquisition unless the user asks about session attribution — say which one you used.
author: claude-draft
